title: USEC_DECODE
text: USEC_DECODE Decode the contents of InBuf and place the result in OutBuf . Return Values USEC_SUCCESS Decode successful, no info returned USEC_ERROR Decode failed, error returned in Error members Description Decode the data in InBuf of length InDataLen . The decoded data must be placed in OutBuf and its length in OutDataLen , which must be less than or equal to OutBufLen . If the output buffer is not large enough to hold the decoded data, return an error. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
